qEnglish: What is the correct technical term for 'Disclaimer'?
qHindi: 'Disclaimer के लिए सही पारिभाषिक शब्द है-
explanationEnglish: A disclaimer is a statement that denies responsibility or affiliation.
explanationHindi: Disclaimer का हिंदी अर्थ 'अस्वीकरण' होता है। [cite: 640-642]
subject: हिंदी

qEnglish: Choose the correct Hindi option for: Insolvency
explanationEnglish: Insolvency is the state of being unable to pay the money owed.
subject: हिंदी

qEnglish: What is the correct technical term for 'Memorandum'?
qHindi: Memorandum' के लिए सही परिभाषित शब्द है?
explanationEnglish: A memorandum is a written message or record used for communication in business or government.
explanationHindi: Memorandum का हिंदी अर्थ 'ज्ञापन' होता है। [cite: 652-656]
subject: हिंदी

qEnglish: Choose the correct English option for 'प्रतिपुष्टि'.
explanationEnglish: Feedback is the information about reactions to a product or a person's performance.
subject: हिंदी

qEnglish: What is the correct technical term for 'Affidavit'?
qHindi: 'Affidavit' के लिए सही पारिभाषिक शब्द है-
explanationEnglish: An affidavit is a written statement confirmed by oath or affirmation.
explanationHindi: न्यायालय या अधिकारी के समक्ष शपथपूर्वक दिए गए लिखित बयान को 'शपथ-पत्र' कहते हैं। [cite: 689-701]
subject: हिंदी
